# חופשה היום — hufsha.today

> הבלוג הישראלי לטיולים וחופשות. מדריכי יעדים, טיולים מאורגנים, הפלגות, כשר — הכל בעברית.

## About

חופשה היום (hufsha.today) is a Hebrew-language travel blog for Israeli travelers. We publish comprehensive destination guides, organized tour comparisons, cruise guides, kosher travel information, and family travel tips.

## Content Categories

- **יעדים (Destinations):** Greece, Italy, Cyprus, Budapest, Dubai — with city-level guides for Athens, Rhodes, Santorini, Crete, Rome, Venice, Florence, Larnaca, Paphos
- **כשר בחו"ל (Kosher Travel):** Kosher hotels, restaurants, Chabad houses worldwide
- **הפלגות (Cruises):** Cruises from Haifa port — MSC, Royal Caribbean, routes and pricing
- **טיולים מאורגנים (Organized Tours):** Group tours from Israel to Montenegro, Greece, Italy and more
- **חופשה עם ילדים (Family Travel):** Kid-friendly destinations, attractions, and practical tips

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://hufsha.today
- Greece guide: https://hufsha.today/greece
- Italy guide: https://hufsha.today/italy
- Cyprus guide: https://hufsha.today/cyprus
- Budapest guide: https://hufsha.today/budapest
- Dubai guide: https://hufsha.today/dubai
- Kosher travel: https://hufsha.today/kosher
- Cruises: https://hufsha.today/cruises
- Organized tours: https://hufsha.today/organized-tours
- Family travel: https://hufsha.today/with-kids
- About: https://hufsha.today/about

## Language

All content is in Hebrew (עברית), right-to-left. The site serves Israeli travelers planning international vacations.

## Contact

hello@hufsha.today
